CREATE TABLE test_lists (id INTEGER, values LIST<INTEGER>);
SELECT values[1:3] FROM test_lists WHERE id = 1;
SELECT values[0:2] FROM test_lists WHERE id = 2;
SELECT values[2:5] FROM test_lists WHERE id = 1;
SELECT values[:4] FROM test_lists WHERE id = 2;
SELECT values[2:] FROM test_lists WHERE id = 1;
SELECT values[:] FROM test_lists WHERE id = 1;
CREATE TABLE another_table (id INTEGER, score ACTIVE INTEGER);
SELECT t.id, t.values[1:3], a.score FROM test_lists t JOIN another_table a ON t.id = a.id;
SELECT t.id, t.values[::2] FROM test_lists t;
SELECT t.values[0:-1] FROM test_lists t WHERE t.id = 1;
SELECT (SELECT values FROM test_lists WHERE id = 1)[1:3];
WITH temp AS (SELECT values FROM test_lists WHERE id = 2) SELECT temp.values[1:4] FROM temp;
CREATE TABLE more_lists (id INTEGER, data LIST<INTEGER>);
SELECT m.data[0:1], t.values[1:2] FROM test_lists t JOIN more_lists m ON t.id = m.id;
SELECT (SELECT data FROM more_lists WHERE id = 1)[:-1];
